body.p1: Pool hashrate is estimated from shares. Tiny miners submit fewer shares, so the estimate can be low, zero, or jumpy in short windows even when the miner is connected. Longer windows smooth the estimate but react more slowly.
body.p2: A small miner may submit only a few shares per window. Low share counts do not always mean the miner is broken. Check pool URL, worker format, accepted shares, and miner logs before changing everything.
desc.accepted_shares: Valid work accepted by the pool.
desc.hashrate: An estimate based on shares over time. It can jump around, especially for small miners.
desc.last_share: The most recent share submitted by a miner or pool.
desc.rejected_shares: Work rejected by the pool because it was invalid, stale, late, or mismatched.
desc.rejection_percentage: Rejected shares divided by total submitted shares.
heading.what_to_check_first_when_shares_: What to check first when shares reject
heading.why_tiny_miners_show_low_counts: Why tiny miners show low counts
hero.lead: Understand HOBC solo pool metrics, difficulty, workers, blocks, and rejections.
hero.title: Pool Stats Guide
meta.description: How to read HOBC solo pool stats and graphs.
meta.title: Pool Stats Guide
term.best_difficulty: Best difficulty: the best share seen in a session or time window.
term.blocks_found: Blocks found: blocks credited to the pool or miner when a share meets network difficulty.
term.confirmed_payout: Confirmed payout: a payout that has completed under the pool rules.
term.estimated_odds: Estimated odds: probability estimates based on hashrate and difficulty. They can change quickly.
term.luck: Luck: a way to describe whether blocks are found earlier or later than statistical expectation. Luck is not a promise.
term.miner_address: Miner address: the HOBC address before the dot in the worker name.
term.network_difficulty: Network difficulty: the chain target required to find a real block.
term.pending_payout: Pending payout: a payout that is not final or not mature yet. Exact maturity rules are To be confirmed unless shown by the live pool.
term.pool_difficulty: Pool difficulty: the assigned share difficulty miners must meet for shares to count.
term.share_becomes_block: A share must meet or beat network difficulty to become a block.
term.worker_name: Worker name: the full configured miner username, usually HOBC_ADDRESS.WORKERNAME.
term.worker_real_address: Use a real HOBC address. Do not use BTC, BCH, DGB, exchange, or unrelated addresses.
troubleshoot.firmware: Miner firmware bug, clock issue, or old configuration profile.
troubleshoot.latency: Network latency or unstable internet connection.
troubleshoot.miner_difficulty: Miner difficulty too high or too low for the device.
troubleshoot.pool_url: Wrong pool URL or wrong port.
troubleshoot.wallet_address: Wrong wallet address or non-HOBC address.
troubleshoot.wrong_algorithm: Wrong algorithm: miner must be compatible with SHA256.
